issue.message: The drawable "arrow_right_white" in drawable-night has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "arrow_right_white" in drawable-notnight has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "cup" in drawable-night has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "cup" in drawable-notnight has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "driver" in drawable-night has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "driver" in drawable-notnight has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "podium" in drawable-night has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "podium" in drawable-notnight has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "race" in drawable-night has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "race" in drawable-notnight has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "time" in drawable-night has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "time" in drawable-notnight has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "winner" in drawable-night has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
